questions.q: On May 11, 2026, NASA released satellite imagery of a massive, colorful 'dirty' water swirl off the Mid-Atlantic coast, primarily caused by spring blooms of what organisms?

On May 11, 2026, a population-based study involving over 1.4 million births in the Canadian Medical Association Journal found a modest risk increase of congenital anomalies in babies born to mothers with what condition?
On May 11, 2026, the RNA Society awarded Dr. Brenda Bass its Lifetime Achievement in Science award, recognizing her early discovery of which RNA-editing enzyme?
